pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which explicitly creates and populates the 'acquired_employees' table in Oracle.
Code analysis of export_result.sh which queries 'user_tables' to ensure 'CLEAN_EMPLOYEES' was created.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which inserts 3 hardcoded edge-case rows and then randomly generates and inserts exactly 42 more rows.
Code analysis of export_result.sh which checks for the existence and content of this specific file path to validate report generation.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data. The source table is named 'ACQUIRED_EMPLOYEES' and contains exactly 45 rows of procedurally corrupted employee data. The expected output is a new table named 'CLEAN_EMPLOYEES' with standardized formatting, as well as a summary report saved to '/home/ga/Desktop/data_cleansing_report.txt'.
